docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $800.00 FILED BY XIE, SUQIAO AS TO DEFENDANT LI, LAIYING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-12-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON 10/14/2025.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-12-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-17-2012 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
RETURNED MAIL: CONTINUE ORDER MAILED 7/12/12 TO DEFENDANT LAIYING LI, "FORWARDING TIME EXPIRED/RETURN TO SENDER, NEW ADDRESS LISTED".
CORRESPONDENCE RE SETTLEMENT RECEIVED AND FILED BY DEFENDANT LI, LAIYING
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE CLAIM HEARING OF AUG-17-2012 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
